spec.precondition: requires valid(nd) && valid_range(nd->attached_processes, 0, 16) && forall i in 0..16: (nd->attached_processes[i].pid != 0 ==> nd->attached_processes[i].open_count > 0)
spec.postcondition: (ensures (result == true ==> (exists i in 0..16: nd->attached_processes[i].pid == task_tgid_nr(get_current()) && nd->attached_processes[i].open_count >= 1)) && (result == false ==> (forall i in 0..16: nd->attached_processes[i].pid != 0 && nd->attached_processes[i].pid != task_tgid_nr(get_current())))) && (result == (npid_find_process_slot(nd) != -1 || (count of zero-pid slots in nd->attached_processes[0..16]) > 0))
